claims.reason: Second-level CLOB, cross-feed latency, queue, and official-resolution evidence must be collected prospectively before a model can be evaluated.

data_contract.database: One append-only DuckDB evidence store with transactional micro-batches and explicit stream-gap records.
data_contract.direct_binance: Record official BTCUSDT, ETHUSDT, and SOLUSDT trade/BBO stream event timestamps and local monotonic arrival timestamps.
data_contract.market_discovery: Gamma API events and markets; require recurrence=5m, active=true, closed=false, enableOrderBook=true, acceptingOrders=true, exact token IDs, eventStartTime, endDate, tick size, minimum size, feesEnabled, and feeSchedule.
data_contract.polymarket_clob: Record full book snapshots, price-level changes, last trades, best bid/ask, tick-size changes, new-market, and market-resolved events for both outcome tokens.
data_contract.polymarket_rtds: Record public crypto_prices and crypto_prices_chainlink updates with source timestamps and local monotonic arrival timestamps.
data_contract.public_history_limit: The CLOB price-history endpoint has minute fidelity and is not accepted as second-level execution evidence.

execution_contract.aggressive_fill: Walk observed price-time book depth after empirically sampled submission latency. Implement FOK and FAK semantics exactly; midpoint and last-price fills are prohibited.
execution_contract.fee_model: Read each market's feeSchedule and apply the protocol fee formula at each match price with documented precision. No static rate is authoritative.
execution_contract.heartbeat: Model the CLOB heartbeat TTL in paper mode; no fill may occur after the last provable connected state and simulated server-side cancellation.
execution_contract.latency: Persist source event time, local wall time, and local monotonic arrival time. Calibrate causal empirical submission/data distributions and replay p50/p95/p99 plus an outage stress case.
execution_contract.passive_fill: Start behind all displayed quantity at the limit price. Only opposite aggressive prints at that price consume queue ahead; cancellations and level disappearance receive zero fill credit.
execution_contract.partial_fill: Reserve cash and create inventory only for filled quantity. Every remainder stays tracked until cancelled, expired, or reconciled.
execution_contract.settlement: Simulate MATCHED, MINED, CONFIRMED, RETRYING, and FAILED. Realized P&L requires CONFIRMED paper settlement or official market resolution.
execution_contract.stop: Cancel and close bot-owned paper state only. Walk executable bids for owned outcome tokens; unresolved remainder is CLOSE_PENDING and blocks new exposure.

lifecycle_parity.external_position_policy: Never adopt, net, cancel, sell, or settle state lacking verified bot ownership.
lifecycle_parity.idempotency: Every intent has one deterministic venue-neutral bot ID and an append-only transition journal. Duplicate submission returns the existing lifecycle.

market_contract.allowlist_source: Automatic Gamma metadata and series recurrence; no manually compiled market IDs.
market_contract.resolution: Use official Polymarket market resolution. Binance direction is never substituted for Chainlink resolution.
market_contract.up_rule: Official end reference price greater than or equal to official start reference price

model_contract.ai: Optional multibillion local AI treatment is asynchronous and matched against the same ML path. It cannot bypass deterministic data, fee, ownership, execution, or risk gates.
model_contract.baseline: Calibrated probability of official Up outcome plus separate CLOB execution/fill model. Trade only positive expected value after actual price-dependent fees, spread, depth, latency, and tail reserve.
model_contract.hedging: Purchasing the opposing outcome is a distinct after-cost action; naked shorting and assumed perfect complement execution are prohibited.
model_contract.latency_edge: Direct Binance versus Polymarket RTDS/CLOB timing is a measured feature hypothesis, not an assumed edge.
model_contract.minimum_evidence: Gap-free prospective windows with complete books, both RTDS feeds, direct Binance, dynamic fees, source/local timestamps, and official outcomes.

operational_contract.stream_gap_policy: Record the gap, invalidate affected training windows, refresh a REST book snapshot, and prohibit inferred events.
operational_contract.supervision: Market data, model, AI, risk, execution, reconciliation, and settlement loops publish independent heartbeats and bounded-deadline results.

rate_limit_contract.entry_reserve: No new paper/live-like session starts above 80% of any observed limit; emergency reconciliation and close capacity is reserved separately.
rate_limit_contract.metadata_refresh: Use event-driven updates and cache immutable market metadata; periodic refresh no faster than necessary.
rate_limit_contract.source: Current official endpoint limits and throttling behavior are configuration evidence, not hard-coded invariants.

risk_contract.loss_basis: Maximum binary settlement loss, not stop distance
risk_contract.portfolio: Apply shared daily/session loss, drawdown, concentration, correlation, cooldown, and stale-data gates. A stop is not assumed to cap loss in a gapping or empty five-minute book.
